faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Port Richmond?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Port Richmond typically ranges from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of colonies present. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Port Richmond?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service throughout Port Richmond and surrounding Staten Island neighborhoods. Our technicians are familiar with the area and can typically arrive within hours of your call to assess and begin treatment of your carpenter ant problem.

faqs.question: What signs indicate carpenter ants in my Port Richmond home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or window sills, rustling sounds inside walls, sighting large black ants especially in spring, and visible damage to wooden structures. Port Richmond's older homes are particularly susceptible, so early detection is crucial.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your carpenter ant treatments in Port Richmond?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If carpenter ants return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing monitoring plans to ensure your Port Richmond property remains carpenter ant-free year-round.
